contests.title: 2 for 1: Every Generation, Twice the Output
contests.description: We just shipped a big generation optimization and we're passing the savings on. On **select models**, you'll now get **two images for the price of one** - same Buzz, double the output.
contests.summary: We just shipped a big generation optimization and we're passing the savings on. On **select models**, you'll now get **two images for the price of one** - same Buzz, double the output....
